judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed the “number of reviews” per state by summing the business.review_count field from the Mongo business collection (see execute_python using var_call_Ls2Lhqi792G7EXK7cwRBbBgG) instead of counting actual review records from the user_database.review table, causing it to pick MO instead of the correct PA and yield the wrong result.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent queried business descriptions (call_gnpcyeq3NsDyPXRY5WHdS50d) and then, due to incorrect regex/state-extraction logic in execute_python (call_rqLCC11InRewNvyGTvHvrr4T and call_hbx7uIOb7HrnohgY2mNv8No6) that yielded no states—even though states like “, PA” appear in the descriptions—ended up with an empty result and returned a “cannot determine” message instead of computing the correct state and average rating.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After querying the business documents and reviews, the agent attempted to extract state abbreviations from the business.description via regex in execute_python but its extraction returned all nulls (e.g., var_call_LnD2MqImaykBk6HG7oF8hcVC shows state null and var_call_iDYcQ82DRAexpDPOQ7yrCH6R shows {"null": 100}), leading it to wrongly conclude the state couldn't be determined despite the descriptions containing patterns like ", PA,".
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
